title: lupinus pilosus var. luthereaui
intro: Lupinus pilosus var. luthereaui is a variety of the lupine plant, specifically a perennial or annual herb that belongs to the legume family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lupinus pilosus var. luthereaui include its potential to act as an expectorant, helping to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs, and its anti-inflammatory properties may also help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Lupinus pilosus var. luthereaui can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
